description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a swimming pool, garden beds, and mature trees. The front of the house includes a covered carport with space for two vehicles and a paved driveway. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor areas. The backyard is spacious, with a pool, patio, and privacy fencing lined with tall hedges. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and wood accents, giving the home a contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by fencing and features a well-maintained lawn and decorative shrubbery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard with a pool and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with garden beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall privacy hedges, backyard lawn, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Backyard-focused view with the swimming pool, patio, and rear entrance to the house visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
